stemHtml: How far and how high up can mountain waves reach originating from the Rocky Mountains (USA)?

options.a: Up to the tropopause and 600 NM downwind.
options.b: By the dimensions of the affecting mountain.
options.c: Up to 36000 ft and approximately 300 NM downwind.
options.d: Up to the tropopause and horizontally as long as there are mountains.
